name: Everflaming Pendant
description: The sun-worshiping cult of the Everflaming was outlawed by the grandfather of the current Amir of Jibey. Only a few isolated communes now remain of what was once a popular faith, having fled persecution to the distant fringes of the empire.
descriptionZh: 崇拜太阳的永焰教曾经风靡一时，只是很早之前就被吉贝阿米尔的祖父归为了不法之教，如今仅存若干公社，为了躲避迫害，逃到了帝国的边陲，彼此没有联系。
